title: ornithocephalus ciliatus
intro: Ornithocephalus ciliatus, also known as the bird's head orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ornithocephalus ciliatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water or steeping it in oil to create tonics and salves.
